mapper.select: SELECT * FROM P_CPU_MEM_T WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND CORE_INDEX IS NULL ORDER BY COLLECTED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM P_CPU_MEM_T WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND CORE_INDEX IS NULL
AND COLLECTED_AT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND COLLECTED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE)
ORDER BY COLLECTED_AT ASC

SELECT c.* FROM P_CPU_MEM_T c INNER JOIN ( SELECT DEVICE_ID, MAX(COLLECTED_AT) as MAX_TIME FROM P_CPU_MEM_T WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND CORE_INDEX IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DEVICE_ID ) latest ON c.DEVICE_ID = latest.DEVICE_ID AND c.COLLECTED_AT = latest.MAX_TIME WHERE c.CORE_INDEX IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.CORE_INDEX ASC

SELECT HOUR(COLLECTED_AT) AS STAT_HOUR, ROUND(AVG(CPU_USAGE), 1) AS AVG_CPU, ROUND(AVG(MEM_USAGE), 1) AS AVG_MEM, ROUND(MAX(CPU_USAGE), 1) AS MAX_CPU, ROUND(MAX(MEM_USAGE), 1) AS MAX_MEM FROM p_cpu_mem_t p JOIN r_device_t d ON p.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE DATE(p.COLLECTED_AT) = #{date} AND p.CORE_INDEX IS NULL AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL GROUP BY HOUR(COLLECTED_AT) ORDER BY STAT_HOUR

SELECT d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP, MAX(p.CPU_USAGE) AS MAX_CPU, MAX(p.MEM_USAGE) AS MAX_MEM, ROUND(AVG(p.CPU_USAGE),1) AS AVG_CPU, ROUND(AVG(p.MEM_USAGE),1) AS AVG_MEM FROM p_cpu_mem_t p JOIN r_device_t d ON p.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE DATE(p.COLLECTED_AT) = #{date} AND p.CORE_INDEX IS NULL AND d.DELETE_AT IS NULL GROUP BY p.DEVICE_ID, d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP ORDER BY MAX_CPU DESC LIMIT #{limit}
